svg.title: SARS temple reconstruction pipeline
svg.desc: Full pipeline for the Scientific Architectural Restoration System showing offline ingestion, conditioning prep, VLM analysis, aggregation, prompt construction, ControlNet generation, and canonical output.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are PDFs chunked for the RAG pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What embedding model is used and why?')
sendPrompt('How does MMR retrieval work in ChromaDB?')
sendPrompt('What image sources were collected for the temple?')
sendPrompt('What is MiDaS monocular depth estimation?')
sendPrompt('What does the conditioning registry contain?')
sendPrompt('How does the two-pass VLM analysis work?')
g.text: Gemma 3 4B · two-pass with RAG · T4 GPU
Roman vs Ottoman separation · confidence zones · 69 images

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are architectural plans analyzed differently?')
sendPrompt('How are all 62 analyses aggregated into one prompt?')
g.text: Confirmed elements · citation pool · plan dimensions

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does canny map cleaning remove minaret and scaffolding edges?')
sendPrompt('How is the citation-grounded prompt built under 70 words?')
g.text: Corinthian order first · RAG constraints · 70-word CLIP limit

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does ControlNet condition SDXL generation?')
sendPrompt('What does the front elevation reconstruction show?')
sendPrompt('What does the three-quarter view show?')
sendPrompt('What does the side elevation show?')
sendPrompt('What does the interior cella view show?')
